title: Amscan 3452201 - Girls 1st Birthday Cupcake Foil SuperShape Balloon - 36"
features: Celebrate your little ones first birthday with this 1st Birthday Cupcake balloon.
Don't forget ribbon and a balloon weight to prevent this fun balloon from floating away!
description: Product Description Large SuperShape balloons really do bring your favourite characters to life! These balloons look great alone or as part of balloon bouquet. Pair with matching foils or latex balloons to create a truly beautiful party gift or decoration. Designed to be inflated with helium, make sure to add a balloon weight and ribbon so your bouquet does not float away! Safety Warning No safety warning Box Contains Foil BalloonS/Shape:1st Birthday Cupcake G See more
